creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Are you referring to this one?

$ pkg which /usr/local/share/doc/freebsd/en/books/handbook/book/index.html 
/usr/local/share/doc/freebsd/en/books/handbook/book/index.html was installed by package en-freebsd-doc-20240410,1

$ ls -latrh /usr/local/share/doc/freebsd/en/books/handbook/book/index.html 
-rw-r--r--  1 root wheel  2.6M Apr 16 20:20 /usr/local/share/doc/freebsd/en/books/handbook/book/index.html

That is the accumulated, one-single-page handbook for instance.
